✨ New Features: Introduce real-time network ping latency monitoring.
Add support for custom aliases on monitor labels.
Implement drag-and-drop reordering for categories and items.
Add a factory reset option to restore default data and settings.
⚡ Improvements: Optimized rendering performance for the status bar and its items.
Enhanced core hardware discovery speed and efficiency.
Refined the visual layout for two-column and raw styles in the status bar.
Improved hardware detection reliability on initial application startup.
Adjusted status bar color thresholds: green now represents values below 60 (previously 50).
Polished UI spacing by reducing gaps between categories.
Updated the tools page icon and increased the maximum width of the settings modal.
🐛 Bug Fixes: Resolved a bottleneck where the extension slowed down LynxHub's startup time.
Cleaned up residual event listeners to prevent potential memory leaks.
Fixed application crashes and unhandled errors during hardware data discovery.
Fixed a bug causing percentages and progress bars to overflow past 100%.
Resolved an issue where missing .NET frameworks or related errors failed to display properly in the status bar.
Fixed the layout of the 'Admin Required' icon within the two-column view.
📌 Minor Changes: Removed redundant network label selection options.

⚡ Improvements: Updated API to latest LynxHub API version.
Updated status bar and items background.

✨ New Features: Added custom sensor metrics and improved hardware discovery.
Updated the Tools page card design to match the new V3.3.0 style.
Refreshed the Settings UI with an improved layout and new animations.

⚡ Improvements: Updated the .NET runtime from version 8 to 9.

🐛 Bug Fixes: Fixed an issue where the 'Show Section Labels' option was not working.

Improvements: Implemented retry logic for device checks
Improve 'Admin Require' layout to support compact mode configuration

Bug Fixes: Prevent inactive hardware metrics from displaying in Status Bar.
Prevent error when sending messages to closed window.
Resolve some hardware detection problems and settings toggle issues causing incorrect behavior

Improvements: Admin privilege required for metrics noted.

Bug Fixes: Fixed white screen issue from extensions.

New Features: Added a Save Settings button to the Tools page modal, with changes now reverting on modal close.

Bug Fixes: Fixed Tools page modal placement to ensure it's centered.
Resolved GitHub API rate limit issues by utilizing locally downloaded versions when available.
Addressed UI performance issues and problems with modal closing.
Removed the status bar when hardware monitoring is disabled.

Features: Real-time monitoring for CPU, GPU, Memory, and System/Application Uptime.
Dynamic status bar with color-coded indicators and progress bars for intuitive feedback on system load.

Customization: Enable 'Compact Mode' for a sleeker, space-saving layout.
Individually select which metrics to display or hide in the status bar.
Toggle section labels (CPU, GPU, etc.) for a cleaner look.
Adjust the data refresh interval to your preference.
